name: x402-adapter
description: Conformance vectors for @peac/adapter-x402 verification and record mapping (v0.12.1 upstream sync)

invalid.description: Invalid verification scenarios that must fail

binding_rules.description: Term-matching is the binding mechanism, not acceptIndex
invariants: acceptIndex is UNSIGNED and MUST be treated as a hint only
acceptIndex is per-offer (not per-challenge envelope)
Verifiers MUST compare accepts[acceptIndex] terms against signed payload
Mismatch between acceptIndex entry and signed payload MUST fail
Absent acceptIndex requires unique match via full scan
Multiple matches without acceptIndex MUST fail (ambiguous)
Amount MUST be a non-negative integer string (regex: ^(0|[1-9][0-9]*)$)
Amount MUST NOT exceed 78 characters (uint256 max)
Network MUST match CAIP-2 format (namespace:reference)
Accepts array MUST NOT exceed 128 entries (DoS protection)
Accepts array JSON MUST NOT exceed 256 KiB (memory protection)
version MUST be a number (not string)
resourceUrl MUST be present and non-empty on offer payload
scheme MUST be present and non-empty on offer payload and accept entries
validUntil: 0 in EIP-712 payloads is a 'no expiry' placeholder, normalized to semantic absence
transaction: '' (empty string) in EIP-712 receipt payloads is a 'no transaction' placeholder, normalized to semantic absence
offerExpiryPolicy 'require' rejects offers without expiry (validUntil absent or zero)
offerExpiryPolicy 'allow_missing' (default) accepts offers without expiry
Receipt resourceUrl MUST match offer resourceUrl (exact string comparison)
Receipt network MUST match offer network
Receipt issuedAt MUST be within offer validity window (with clock skew tolerance)

jws_hardening_rules.description: JWS compact serialization parsing hardening rules
invariants: Compact JWS MUST have exactly 3 dot-separated segments
Base64url segments MUST NOT contain padding characters (=)
JWS payload MUST decode to a JSON object (not array, primitive, or null)
Compact JWS MUST NOT exceed maxCompactJwsBytes (default 64 KiB) before decoding
